ops.text: P1 complete (2026-07-18): six packages landed and CI-green at 13e525ed (proc, service, appgroup, version, paths, bundle — 8 commits). Execution note: the routed sol×5 codex fan-out failed twice (2 lanes hung frozen mid-ccx-read, 2 OOM-killed at 137; then the retry found codex quota exhausted until Jul 24 — note b0800987). Recovery: byte-identical donor cp survived on disk; delta pass re-dispatched on opus xhigh (wf_ea4a325a-6bb) — all lanes green first try; opus xhigh finder review substituted same-tier (1 low finding: service golden fixture BundleID==Label, fixed). Post-gate fixes: golangci tuned for a process-spawning library (G204/G304/Close/G104 carve-outs; 2 real code fixes), revive unused-param stub fix, Go 1.26.3 bump for stdlib GO-2026-4971. Delta-6 (shared-state TryLock/Update) had no proc donor — deferred to P2's daemon shell where the state file first exists. P2b (supervise + reaper) dispatched on opus (wf_41970488-4df); P0b signing fixtures proven non-interactive on this host (Developer ID SXKCTF23Q2 signs without prompting).
